nasb.text: but those who are considered worthy to attain to that age and the resurrection from the dead, neither marry nor are given in marriage;

esv.text: but those who are considered worthy to attain to that age and to the resurrection from the dead neither marry nor are given in marriage,

cnv.text: 但配得那世界的，又配從死人中復活的人，也不娶也不嫁。

ccb.text: 但那些配得将来的世界、从死里复活的人也不娶也不嫁，

csbs.text: 但那些算是配得上承受那世代，又配得上从死人中复活的人，既不娶也不嫁。
